description_long: This object consists of a cluster of four residential houses arranged around a central courtyard, each with steeply pitched red gable roofs and pastel-colored facades in yellow, green, and pink. The central house, painted yellow, features prominent arched windows and a main entryway with steps leading up to it. The surrounding houses are simpler in design, with rectangular windows and minimal ornamentation. The entire group is bordered by a dense row of leafy green trees, creating a sense of enclosure and privacy. Pathways and small garden areas are visible between the houses, suggesting a shared communal space. The overall layout and architectural details evoke a quaint, European-style residential enclave.
description: A cluster of four pastel-colored houses with red gable roofs, arranged around a central courtyard and surrounded by dense green trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main yellow house with arched windows and entry steps, flanked by three pastel houses and bordered by trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pastel facades and the arrangement of houses around the central courtyard, with trees forming a perimeter.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the yellow house and the symmetrical layout of the four houses, with dense tree coverage.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the side of the yellow house and the green house, with visible pathways and garden areas between the buildings.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with steps, arched doorway, and minimal decorative elements
